In [18]:
import cv2
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import os
import glob

# Configurare căi
dataset_path = r"C:\Users\Bogdan\Desktop\proiect TDAV\poze MSER bune"
out_dir = "rezultate_mser5"
out_dir_etape = "rezultate_mser_etape5"
if not os.path.exists(out_dir): os.makedirs(out_dir)
if not os.path.exists(out_dir_etape): os.makedirs(out_dir_etape)

# Alegem imaginea demo
image_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(dataset_path, '*.jpg'))
demo_path = image_files[0]

# PASUL 0: Citire RGB și conversie GRAY
img_bgr = cv2.imread(demo_path)
img_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(img_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
img_gray = cv2.cvtColor(img_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)

print("Etapa 0: Conversie din RGB în Grayscale finalizată.")
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15, 7))
ax[0].imshow(img_rgb); ax[0].set_title("Imagine Originală (RGB)"); ax[0].axis('off')
ax[1].imshow(img_gray, cmap='gray'); ax[1].set_title("Imagine Grayscale (Sursa pt. MSER)"); ax[1].axis('off')
plt.show()

Etapa 0: Conversie din RGB în Grayscale finalizată.
In [20]:
mser = cv2.MSER_create()
regions, _ = mser.detectRegions(img_gray)
valid_boxes = []
img_step1 = img_rgb.copy()

for region in regions:
    x, y, w, h = cv2.boundingRect(region)
    if (w*h < 80 or w*h > 10000): continue
    if (0.1 > float(w)/h or float(w)/h > 4.0): continue

    # Filtru Stroke Width
    mask_char = np.zeros((h, w), dtype=np.uint8)
    cv2.fillPoly(mask_char, [region - [x, y]], 255)
    mean_val, std_val = cv2.meanStdDev(cv2.distanceTransform(mask_char, cv2.DIST_L2, 3), mask=mask_char)
    if mean_val[0][0] > 0 and (std_val[0][0] / mean_val[0][0] > 0.8): continue
            
    valid_boxes.append((x, y, w, h))
    cv2.rectangle(img_step1, (x, y), (x + w, y + h), (255, 255, 0), 2)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,7))
plt.imshow(img_step1)
plt.title("Etapa 1: Detectare Litere individuale")
plt.axis('off')
plt.show()
In [21]:
mask_words = np.zeros_like(img_gray)
for (x, y, w, h) in valid_boxes:
    cv2.rectangle(mask_words, (x, y), (x + w, y + h), 255, -1)

kernel = cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_RECT, (20, 3))
dilated_mask = cv2.dilate(mask_words, kernel, iterations=2)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,7))
plt.imshow(dilated_mask, cmap='gray')
plt.title("Etapa 2: Mască binară după Dilatare")
plt.axis('off')
plt.show()
In [22]:
img_final_demo = img_rgb.copy()
contours, _ = cv2.findContours(dilated_mask, cv2.RETR_EXTERNAL, cv2.CHAIN_APPROX_SIMPLE)
for c in contours:
    if cv2.contourArea(c) > 100:
        x, y, w, h = cv2.boundingRect(c)
        cv2.rectangle(img_final_demo, (x, y), (x + w, y + h), (0, 255, 0), 3)

plt.figure(figsize=(10,7))
plt.imshow(img_final_demo)
plt.title("Etapa 3: Rezultat Final")
plt.axis('off')
plt.show()

def process_batch_5_steps(img_list, d_out, d_etape):
    for p in img_list[:10]:
        base = cv2.imread(p)
        rgb = cv2.cvtColor(base, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)
        gray = cv2.cvtColor(base, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
        
        # MSER & Filtre
        mser_obj = cv2.MSER_create()
        regs, _ = mser_obj.detectRegions(gray)
        boxes = []
        img_l = rgb.copy()
        for r in regs:
            x, y, w, h = cv2.boundingRect(r)
            if 80 <= w*h <= 10000 and 0.1 <= w/h <= 4.0:
                boxes.append((x,y,w,h))
                cv2.rectangle(img_l, (x,y), (x+w, y+h), (255,255,0), 2)
        
        # Dilatare
        m_w = np.zeros_like(gray)
        for (x,y,w,h) in boxes: cv2.rectangle(m_w, (x,y), (x+w,y+h), 255, -1)
        dil = cv2.dilate(m_w, cv2.getStructuringElement(cv2.MORPH_RECT, (20,3)), iterations=2)
        
        # Final
        res = rgb.copy()
        cnts, _ = cv2.findContours(dil, cv2.RETR_EXTERNAL, cv2.CHAIN_APPROX_SIMPLE)
        for c in cnts:
            if cv2.contourArea(c) > 100:
                bx, by, bw, bh = cv2.boundingRect(c)
                cv2.rectangle(res, (bx, by), (bx+bw, by+bh), (0,255,0), 2)
        
        # Salvare colaj 5 pași
        fname = os.path.basename(p)
        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 5, figsize=(25, 5))
        axes[0].imshow(rgb); axes[0].set_title("1. RGB"); axes[0].axis('off')
        axes[1].imshow(gray, cmap='gray'); axes[1].set_title("2. Gray"); axes[1].axis('off')
        axes[2].imshow(img_l); axes[2].set_title("3. Litere"); axes[2].axis('off')
        axes[3].imshow(dil, cmap='gray'); axes[3].set_title("4. Mască"); axes[3].axis('off')
        axes[4].imshow(res); axes[4].set_title("5. Final"); axes[4].axis('off')
        plt.savefig(os.path.join(d_etape, f"etape_{fname}"), bbox_inches='tight')
        plt.close()
        cv2.imwrite(os.path.join(d_out, f"res_{fname}"), cv2.cvtColor(res, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))

process_batch_5_steps(image_files, out_dir, out_dir_etape)
print("Procesare batch completă!")

Procesare batch completă!
